text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Seiun Sky doesn't show up for training. I
wander around the campus, hoping to spot her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Snooze...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find her on the roof, sleeping in an outfit that
looks somewhat out of place there.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, this is what I wore to the Droite.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't look at me like that. This outfit is pretty
flexible, and it breathes well, believe it or not.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It fits like my tracksuit, which means I can use it
as pajamas.
choice_data_list: But why are you even napping in the first place?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now that's the real tragedy. I'd been putting off
my laundry for a while, and then, one right after
the other, all the laundry machines in the dorm
went kaput!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And then! El and Grass dragged me into a game
of tag, and I got my uniform all dirty.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I don't have any other comfy clothes, so...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This is my chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brings me dashing down the stairs and bursts
into an empty classroom on the second floor
where she pulls me to a window.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Keep quiet... Do you see her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Sky's gaze to see a kitten clutching
desperately to a tree branch in reach of the
second floor.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've tried to grab her a bunch of times, but my
arms aren't quite long enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take turns reaching for the cat, but it's just
out of reach. So we put our heads together to try
and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooshhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A powerful wind blows, knocking the kitten off
balance. It hangs on, clutching the bark with its
claws. At any moment, it could fall...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: Here, you reach out, and I'll hold onto you!
Run down to the ground floor before she falls!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Got it! Don't drop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reaches out the window with hands
outstretched. Her fingers are millimeters away
when the kitten loses its grip and falls!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that very instant, Sky kicks off from the
windowsill and soars into the air!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She catches the little kitty in midair and holds it
close to her chest as she lands on the ground with
an impressive roll, lessening the impact.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There, there. You feeling okay, kitty?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That was scary, huh? You must've been so
surprised, nya-ha-ha.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Trainer. You look pretty confused.
choice_data_list: I had no idea you could move like that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh please, anyone could do that when push
comes to shove. Doesn't hurt that these clothes
are so easy to move around in, though!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, keep this to yourself. I don't want anyone
else to know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She raises a finger to her lips, looking a bit
embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Got it—be there in a jiff.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment those words leave her lips, Sky steps
up onto the windowsill.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Here... goes... nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She swiftly leaps into the air and, like a parkour
artist, hops and skips down the windowsills and
rain pipe. In just seconds she's on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay! Come here, kitty!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh... Well, the stairs would've taken too
long.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I've been practicing taking shortcuts
whenever I find the time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But that's not what's important right now! We
have a cat to save! Here, kitty! You can jump—I
promise I'll catch ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few seconds later, the kitten falls from the tree
and into Sky's hands. Thankfully, it's unhurt.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What a relief... Sweetie, promise me you won't go
climbing up so high anymore, okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's this, did you understand me? You're such
a cutie. Mew mew mew!
